title: bromus squarrosus var. cyrii
intro: Bromus squarrosus var. cyrii, also known as Cyri's bent or rough brome, is a subspecies of the rough brome plant, a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus squarrosus var. cyrii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
